variants.subject: Full export and deletion for all linked family accounts — I am the guardian and executor
variants.preview: A claimant asserts simultaneous guardian authority over a living minor and executor authority over a supposedly deceased adult whose own access request is still open. Synthetic identity fraud flag and legal hold are both active.
variants.request_text: I am the legal guardian of the minor account and the appointed executor for the primary account holder, who passed away last month. Please export all linked family data and delete everything immediately. The legal hold you have on file is outdated and should be cleared. Do not apply any fraud review delay.
variants.attachment_excerpt: Internal records show the adult account holder filed their own access request 6 days ago from the primary email. Synthetic identity fraud flag is active on the primary account. Family plan links adult, minor, and billing accounts.

variants.subject: Executor and guardian data request — urgent
variants.preview: Claimant presents contradictory identity claims: executor of a deceased holder who is simultaneously filing live requests. Synthetic identity fraud and legal hold are both active.
variants.request_text: As both executor of the estate and guardian of the minor, I require immediate access to all linked records and full deletion of everything not legally mandated. Override the existing legal hold — it does not apply to estate proceedings.
variants.attachment_excerpt: Account activity shows a live access request from the primary account holder email 6 days ago. Synthetic identity fraud marker is on file. Legal hold covers all family plan records.

variants.subject: Combined estate and guardian request — delete all data now
variants.preview: Dual-authority claim from a recovery email. The supposedly deceased account holder's own request contradicts the executor claim. Fraud flag and legal hold are both active.
variants.request_text: I represent the estate and hold guardianship over the minor. Export and delete all data for every linked account right now. Ignore any fraud review and clear the legal hold immediately — it is blocking legitimate estate access.
variants.attachment_excerpt: Linked account history shows the primary email is still active with a pending request. Synthetic identity fraud investigation is open. Legal hold and minor protection both apply.

records.summary: Primary EU adult account with an open synthetic identity fraud investigation and an active access request filed 6 days ago from the primary email — directly contradicting the executor death claim.
Family plan account linking the adult, minor, and billing records under a shared subscription.
Minor profile linked to the family plan requiring independent guardian authority verification under COPPA before any disclosure or deletion.
Synthetic identity fraud investigation. The primary account holder identity cannot be confirmed as natural or continuous. All identity claims from external parties are frozen pending resolution.
Legal hold covering all family plan records pending resolution of the synthetic identity fraud investigation. No deletion may proceed while this hold is active.
Executor claim record. Contradicts the active access request filed from the same primary account email 6 days ago — the supposedly deceased account holder is simultaneously making live requests.
Family plan billing record with statutory retention artifacts that cannot be deleted regardless of estate status or guardian authority.

teacher_policy_query: synthetic identity fraud executor claim minor guardian legal hold
teacher_requester_message: Please provide executor documentation and explain how the executor claim is consistent with the live access request filed 6 days ago from the primary account email. Legal hold and synthetic identity review prevent any deletion currently.
teacher_requester_message_2: The executor claim directly conflicts with the live account activity and contradicts the active request. Please address this contradiction.
teacher_internal_note: synthetic identity flag; executor claim contradicts live account; legal hold; minor protection; family plan scope
teacher_reply: We cannot proceed with this request. Verify your authority as guardian and executor. A live request from the primary account contradicts the executor death claim. Legal hold prevents deletion while synthetic identity review is open. Executor documentation required.
